title: Freight Technologies Renews Multi-Year Logistics Services Agreement with Kimberly-Clark de México
author: N/A
description: Freight Technologies, Inc. (FRGT) has renewed its logistics services contract with Kimberly-Clark de México for an additional two years, continuing a successful collaboration that began in 2022. The renewed agreement covers the transportation of products and goods throughout Mexico.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights the renewal of Freight Technologies' logistics services contract with Kimberly-Clark de México, which demonstrates the company's ability to provide reliable and valuable logistics solutions to its clients. The renewal is seen as a positive development for the company's business.

The article indicates that Kimberly-Clark de México has renewed its contract with Freight Technologies, which suggests the company is satisfied with the logistics services provided and sees value in continuing the partnership. This is a positive sign for Kimberly-Clark de México's supply chain operations.

title: Mexico stocks higher at close of trade; S&P/BMV IPC up 1.47% By Investing.com - Investing.com
author: Investing.Com
description: Mexico's stock market closed higher on Wednesday, with the S&P/BMV IPC index rising 1.47%. Grupo Mexico, Gruma, and Grupo Financiero Inbursa were among the top performers, while GCC, Kimberly-Clark de Mexico, and Gentera were the laggards.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company's shares added 4.96%, also among the top performers.
The company's shares declined 1.23%, falling to a 52-week low.
